历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plans
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for Physics Category were approximately 19495 → 19571 → 16742 → 22089 → 24450, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (ranking numbers increasing). In the past 3 years, the ranking has shifted backward by about 7700 places. The 2025 baseline is approximately 24450, the highest in the past 5 years (most difficult to enter). The university's enrollment plan for Physics Category in Anhui Province was 173 in 2021, 175 in 2022, 174 in 2023, 176 in 2024, and 175 in 2025, remaining generally stable. In 2026, the plan increases to 182 (an expansion of about 4%), which slightly intensifies competition, causing ranking numbers to tend to increase.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university. In the 2026 Soft Science China University Rankings, it ranks approximately 73rd, a slight decline from 2021 (67th), but still among the top 100 national science and engineering universities. In 2026 reputation data, there are no significant negative or positive events recorded for this university. Its Douyin popularity does not enter the top 100 overall rankings, with average attention. In recent years, there have been no records of enrollment gaps or sharp drops, and the application psychology is relatively stable.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: The university is characterized by traditional engineering fields such as petroleum and petrochemicals, geological resources, and chemical engineering, with stable social popularity for related majors. In 2026, the total number of Gaokao examinees in Anhui Province is approximately 451,000 (a slight decrease from about 462,000 total for Physics and History categories in 2025). The estimated number of Physics Category examinees is about 313,000 (a decrease of about 2.4% from approximately 321,000 in 2025). The slight decline in examinee numbers eases competition somewhat. Provincial control line data for 2026 is missing.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Combining the 2025 baseline ranking of approximately 24450, the 2026 enrollment expansion of about 4% (ranking shifts backward by about 590 places), and the decrease in local Physics Category examinees by about 2.4% (ranking shifts forward by about 590 places), the supply-demand elasticity roughly offsets. Considering the stable university level, average reputation, and stable major popularity, the minimum ranking for 2026 is expected to be around 25000, a slight backward shift of about 550 places from 2025. The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 25000, with a range of 24500–25500.
